/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/weather_engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/weather_engine.dir/WeatherEngine.cpp.o -o weather_engine  /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security
